tests.message: ./example_partial_error.moon:5: attempt to call a number value (for iterator 'for iterator')
tests.name: empty strands

tests.message: ./example_partial_error.moon:5: attempt to call a number value (for iterator 'for iterator')
tests.name: single letter identical strands

tests.message: ./example_partial_error.moon:5: attempt to call a number value (for iterator 'for iterator')
tests.name: single letter different strands

tests.message: ./example_partial_error.moon:5: attempt to call a number value (for iterator 'for iterator')
tests.name: long identical strands

tests.message: ./example_partial_error.moon:5: attempt to call a number value (for iterator 'for iterator')
tests.name: long different strands

tests.test_code:
f = -> hamming.distance 'AATG', 'AAA'
    assert.has.error f, 'strands must be of equal length'
tests.name: disallow first strand longer

tests.test_code:
f = -> hamming.distance 'ATA', 'AGTG'
    assert.has.error f, 'strands must be of equal length'
tests.name: disallow second strand longer

tests.test_code:
f = -> hamming.distance '', 'G'
    assert.has.error f, 'strands must be of equal length'
tests.name: disallow empty first strand

tests.test_code:
f = -> hamming.distance 'G', ''
    assert.has.error f, 'strands must be of equal length'
tests.name: disallow empty second strand
